user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Fabrikam Residences.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 08:19 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-10 11:06 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-24 17:56 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences consumption trend

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Fabrikam Residences
Date: 2024-03-06
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:05:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:09:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:18:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:20:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:25:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:28:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:31:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
